description_long: This object is a pair of standard scissors featuring two symmetrical, black plastic handles and long, straight metal blades. The handles are oval-shaped, providing comfortable finger loops for gripping, and are joined at a central pivot point with a visible metallic screw. The blades are slender, tapering to a pointed tip, and are made of a shiny metallic material, likely stainless steel, suitable for precise cutting. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible embellishments or brand markings, making it suitable for general-purpose use in urban environments such as offices, schools, or homes. The surface of the handles appears smooth and glossy, while the blades have a metallic sheen.
description: A pair of black-handled, metal-bladed scissors with symmetrical oval loops and pointed tips, joined by a central screw. The design is simple, functional, and unbranded.
description_view_0: Front view showing both black oval handles and the full length of the pointed metal blades.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thin profile of the scissors, with the handles and blades aligned edge-on.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, showing the handles and blades from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile of the scissors with minimal visible detail.
attribute_handle_type: Symmetrical, oval-shaped, ambidextrous handles made of smooth black plastic with no special grip features.
attribute_blade_joint_type: Visible metallic screw pivot, not adjustable, standard design.
attribute_finger_loop_design: Two equal-sized oval loops, smooth surface, no inserts or anatomical contours, accommodates multiple fingers.
attribute_blade_tip_style: Pointed tip style for precision cutting.
